lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Hello? Can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know? Can you?

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Hang on... You're one of them easterners, aren't you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I suppose I am.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Kuani! I'm Emelio, and you might be just the person I need to help me out with an exciting new business venture!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What business venture?

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Well as an easterner, I've no doubt you're all too familiar with the wonder that is the kabit!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Kabit? What's a kabit?

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: You don't know? But how could you not know? My life was changed forever when I tried one!

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Believe it or not, I never used to be keen on opening the Kingdom to outsiders. In fact, I even spent some time as part of the Varlaless movement.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: But then I tried a kabit, and it changed everything! If that's the kind of food you easterners can make, then as far as I'm concerned, you're welcome here any day of the week!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay... but what's a kabit?

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: A kabit! The amazing blend of meat, spices and salad, all wrapped in bread! Genius!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, you mean a kebab!

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Yes, kebab! Brilliant!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But what do kebabs have to do with this business venture?

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Well, quite simply, I wish to bring the kebab to Varlamore. Everyone here deserves a chance to taste their brilliance!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you're opening a kebab shop?

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Exactly!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. So what is it you need help with?

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: My hope is to blend ingredients from the east with ones from right here in Varlamore. The end result will be a mighty kebab just like you easterners make, but with a Varlamorian twist!

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Problem is, some of the ingredients I've ordered haven't arrived yet. Would you be able to go and see what the delay is?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Which ingredients haven't arrived?

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: We're still missing the Kharidian spices I ordered in. The Spice Merchant in the Bazaar was sorting that out for me. We don't have the buffalo meat either. That was coming from Alba at Ortus Farm.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I guess I can go see where they've got to.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Kuani! I look forward to your return.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, but I think I'll have to pass on this one.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Nilsal, friend. Any luck with those missing ingredients?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Which ingredients was it again?

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: We're still missing the Kharidian spices I ordered in. The Spice Merchant in the Bazaar was sorting that out for me. We don't have the buffalo meat either. That was coming from Alba at Ortus Farm.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I guess I can go see where they've got to.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Kuani! I look forward to your return.

sections.title: Talking to the spice merchant again

lines.speaker: Spice Merchant
lines.text: A little bit of spice makes everything taste nice! Come and get it here!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have a look at that locked box?

lines.speaker: Spice Merchant
lines.text: Sure thing!

lines.speaker: Spice Merchant
lines.text: Kuani! You did it! I'll have these sent over to Emelio right away. Thanks for the help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't mention it.

sections.title: Talking to the spice merchant after unlocking the box

lines.speaker: Spice Merchant
lines.text: A little bit of spice makes everything taste nice! Come and get it here!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: About that missing delivery...

lines.speaker: Spice Merchant
lines.text: It's on route to Emelio as we speak. I'm sure it will be with him soon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Perfect, thank you.

sections.title: Talking to Emelio after unlocking the box (before taking care of the buffalo meat)

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Nilsal, friend. Any luck with those missing ingredients?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Which ingredients was it again?

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: We're still missing the Kharidian spices I ordered in. The Spice Merchant in the Bazaar was sorting that out for me. We don't have the buffalo meat either. That was coming from Alba at Ortus Farm.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I did manage to speak to the Spice Merchant and helped them get that delivery sorted, it should be here soon.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Kuani! Now all that's left is the buffalo meat.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: I'm on it.

lines.speaker: Spice Merchant
lines.text: A little bit of spice makes everything taste nice! Come and get it here!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm here about a missing delivery.

lines.speaker: Spice Merchant
lines.text: Ah, I'm betting Emelio sent you, right?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's right!

lines.speaker: Spice Merchant
lines.text: Well the good news is that his spices arrived this morning. The bad news is that I can't get the box open.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can't get the box open? How come?

lines.speaker: Spice Merchant
lines.text: Well this is the first time I've ever had to order in spices from the east, so I needed to find a reputable supplier. I ended up going with a guy called Ali Morrisane who seemed like he knew his stuff.

lines.speaker: Spice Merchant
lines.text: Thing is, he's gone and locked the box to make sure the goods can't be stolen, but hasn't told me how to unlock it again!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Here, let me take a look.

lines.speaker: Spice Merchant
lines.text: Sure thing!

lines.speaker: Alba
lines.text: Nilsal, iknami. Any luck with that wolf?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm still working on it.

lines.speaker: Alba
lines.text: You'll find the den directly west of here. Remember, it's the big one that we need dealing with.

lines.speaker: Alba
lines.text: Nilsal, iknami. What can I do for you today?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm guessing you must be Alba? Emelio sent me to check up on his meat order.

lines.speaker: Alba
lines.text: Ah, yes. Apologies, iknami, but we've been dealing with a bit of a wolf problem recently and it's delayed some of our orders.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A wolf problem? Maybe I could help out with that?

lines.speaker: Alba
lines.text: Well we'd never say no to some extra help, and it would mean we'd be able to get working on Emelio's order faster.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds like we have a deal then. What do you need me to do?

lines.speaker: Alba
lines.text: The wolves have a den directly west of here. Most of them don't cause too much of a problem, but there's a big one that we've been struggling with.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll head over there and deal with this wolf.

lines.speaker: Alba
lines.text: Thank you, iknami.

sections.title: Upon entering the Dire Wolf cave

lines.speaker: Dire Wolf Alpha
lines.text: Grrr!

lines.speaker: Dire Wolf Alpha
lines.text: Aarrooooo!

sections.title: Upon killing the Dire Wolf Alpha

lines.speaker: Dire Wolf
lines.text: Aarrooooo!

sections.title: Talking to Alba after killing the Dire Wolf Alpha

lines.speaker: Alba
lines.text: Nilsal, iknami. Any luck with that wolf?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's been dealt with.

lines.speaker: Alba
lines.text: Kuani! Thank you so much for the help, iknami. While you were gone, I was able to get Emelio's order finished. It's on the way to him now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Perfect! Thank you for sorting that.

lines.speaker: Alba
lines.text: Not a problem. Until next time, iknami.

sections.title: Talking to Emelio after taking care of the buffalo meat (before unlocking the spice box)

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Nilsal, friend. Any luck with those missing ingredients?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Which ingredients was it again?

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: We're still missing the Kharidian spices I ordered in. The Spice Merchant in the Bazaar was sorting that out for me. We don't have the buffalo meat either. That was coming from Alba at Ortus Farm.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I did manage to speak to Alba and helped them get that delivery sorted, it should be here soon.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Kuani! Now all that's left is the spices.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm on it.

lines.speaker: Lucas
lines.text: I hope this food is worth it. I've got plenty of other things to be doing.

lines.speaker: Renata
lines.text: I'll never turn down free food! I just hope it tastes good!

lines.speaker: Vincens
lines.text: I wonder what Emelio has cooked up this time.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Nilsal, friend. Thanks to your good work out there, all the ingredients have now arrived! Now we move on to the critical step: The recipe!

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Outside, I have gathered the finest group of connoisseurs who will assist us in finding the perfect ratio of ingredients to achieve the ultimate kebab!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where did these connoisseurs come from?

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Oh, I just went into the local pub and promised a free drink to anyone who would help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. Are you sure they're going to give us the most reliable opinions?

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Of course! People like them are going to be our top customers!

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Imagine, you've been out late at your local establishment, and before heading home, you find yourself in need of the perfect late-night meal. That is where we come in!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If you're sure.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Absolutely! Now, before we get our recipe sorted, I've allowed our friends outside to try the ingredients individually. They'll have already formed some opinions on how much of each is right.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Head on out there and have a chat with them to see if you can work out the perfect ratio of meat, salad, spice and sauce.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll get right on it.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Kuani!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. I was wondering if you had any thoughts on ingredient ratios for these kebabs?

lines.speaker: Vincens
lines.text: The sauce is essential. You want there to be as much sauce as there is spice and salad combined.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. I was wondering if you had any thoughts on ingredient ratios for these kebabs?

lines.speaker: Renata
lines.text: Don't overdo the spice! You want to make sure there's less spice than there is salad.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. I was wondering if you had any thoughts on ingredient ratios for these kebabs?

lines.speaker: Lucas
lines.text: Well the main thing is to make sure you're not putting too much salad in. You want there to be twice as much meat as there is salad.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, thanks.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Nilsal, friend. Have you worked out the ingredient ratios yet?

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Kuani! I've currently got one portion each of meat, salad, spice and sauce, but I reckon we can fit in up to four portions of each. What are we going for?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's try one portion of meat.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: That's what we have already. Maybe we should change something else.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's try two portions of meat.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Very well. Anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's try three portions of meat.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Very well. Anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's try four portions of meat.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Very well. Anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's try one portion of salad.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: That's what we have already. Maybe we should change something else.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's try two portions of salad.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Very well. Anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's try three portions of salad.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Very well. Anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's try four portions of salad.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Very well. Anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's try one portion of spice.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: That's what we have already. Maybe we should change something else.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's try two portions of spice.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Very well. Anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's try three portions of spice.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Very well. Anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's try four portions of spice.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Very well. Anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's try one portion of sauce.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: That's what we have already. Maybe we should change something else.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's try two portions of sauce.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Very well. Anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's try three portions of sauce.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Very well. Anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's try four portions of sauce.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Very well. Anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think that's perfect!

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Kuani! That gives us [number] portion[s] of meat, [number] portion[s] of salad, [number] portion[s] of spice and [number] portion[s] of sauce. Definitely happy with that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds good to me.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Well in that case, why don't you take this kebab to one of our connoisseurs outside and see what they reckon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, let's make some more changes.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Very well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm still working on it.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you make of this?

lines.speaker: Renata
lines.text: Eww! This is awful.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh. I guess we'd better try again.

lines.speaker: Renata
lines.text: This is brilliant! Amazing stuff!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fantastic! I'll let Emilio know right away!

sections.title: Talking to Emelio after a failed taste test

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Have you seen what our connoisseurs reckon of that kebab?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They didn't like it.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Tatamo! This is worse than the day my father left us! We must try again. I've currently got [number] portion[s] of meat, [number] portion[s] of salad, [number] portion[s] of spice and [number] portion[s] of sauce. What shall we change?

sections.title: Talking to Emelio after a successful taste test

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Have you seen what our connoisseurs reckon of that kebab?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They loved it!

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Excellent!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So are we all ready to start selling now?

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Not quite, iknami. There is one final thing we must do. We now know we have a winning recipe, but we need the rest of Varlamore to know as well!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do we do that?

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: One word, iknami: Marketing! And I know just the place to do it.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: You must visit Lelia at the Colosseum at once. Take her a sample of our fine kebabs, and she will beg us to let her help sell them to the people of Varlamore!

sections.title: Talking to Lucas after a successful taste test

lines.speaker: Lucas
lines.text: Well now that we're done here, when am I getting paid?

sections.title: Talking to Renata after a successful taste test

lines.speaker: Renata
lines.text: I think I deserve a lifetime supply of these kebabs for helping to get things started.

sections.title: Talking to Vincens after a successful taste test

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Nilsal, friend. Have you taken those kebabs to Lelia at the Colosseum yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I lost one.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Tatamo! We're very lucky I made some spares.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Now you must hurry over there at once!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I lost one.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Tatamo! We're very lucky I made some spares.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Now you must hurry over there at once!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Then you must hurry over there at once!

lines.speaker: Vincens
lines.text: I think Emelio might actually be on for a winner this time.* (End of dialogue)

lines.speaker: Lelia
lines.text: Are you ready? Your advertising slot is coming up and I don't intend to delay the contest for you.

sections.title: Talking to Lelia again before killing the minotaur

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That minotaur tried to kill me!

lines.speaker: Lelia
lines.text: Yes, he doesn't seem too happy about those kebabs. I'll speak to the beastmaster about it. In the meantime, you'd better get in there and deal with him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But why?

lines.speaker: Lelia
lines.text: Because if you don't, no one will want to buy those kebabs of yours.

sections.title: Talking to Lelia after killing the minotaur

lines.speaker: Lelia
lines.text: You put on a good performance in there. The crowd seemed very impressed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What about that minotaur?

lines.speaker: Lelia
lines.text: What about it? It got out of control and you killed it. Saves the beastmaster a job.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But it could have killed me! You said it would be safe.

lines.speaker: Lelia
lines.text: You survived, didn't you? I don't see the problem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But...

lines.speaker: Lelia
lines.text: Now, I need to get things ready for the next slot. Why don't you go and tell Emelio about the good impression his kebabs made.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fine.

sections.title: Talking to Lelia again after killing the minotaur

lines.speaker: Lelia
lines.text: I don't think you need anything else, do you? Why don't you go and tell Emelio about the good impression his kebabs made.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, thanks, I guess.

lines.speaker: Lelia
lines.text: Need something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you Lelia? Emelio sent me to speak to you.

lines.speaker: Lelia
lines.text: Looking to market another one of his buisness ideas is he? It will cost him double this time. We still haven't cleaned up the mess made by his last great idea.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is this a common occurance?

lines.speaker: Lelia
lines.text: Emelio having ideas, or said ideas not being very good? Yes to both, I suppose.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well he seems very confident about this one.

lines.speaker: Lelia
lines.text: Alright, let's hear it then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He wants to bring a new type of food to Varlamore: kebabs. We have them over in the east. Here, he sent one for you to try.

lines.speaker: Lelia
lines.text: Hmm... I must admit, I'm somewhat impressed. Emelio might finally be on to something here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you'll help?

lines.speaker: Lelia
lines.text: Yes, and it's your lucky day. We have an advertising spot open before the next contest. The last promoter had to pull out suddenly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excellent! So how does this work exactly.

lines.speaker: Lelia
lines.text: Nice and simple really. Before the contest starts, we run a couple of adverts for local businesses. You get a few minutes to promote your product however you feel suitable.

lines.speaker: Lelia
lines.text: In some cases we allow promoters to make use of some of the Colosseum creatures as part of their advert, provided I deem it suitable.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And would our kebabs be considered suitable?

lines.speaker: Lelia
lines.text: Well I suppose they did impress me, and we do have a young minotaur spare from that promoter who had to pull out. Very well, you can make use of him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great! So, er... What do I do with this minotaur?

lines.speaker: Lelia
lines.text: You want to convince people to buy these kebabs, right? I'd suggest you head on in, take a bite out of one and then give the minotaur a good kick.

lines.speaker: Lelia
lines.text: He'll pretend to go down in one. The audience will love it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will the minotaur be okay with that?

lines.speaker: Lelia
lines.text: Why wouldn't he be?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I guess I don't really know much about minotaurs.

lines.speaker: Lelia
lines.text: If the crowd is happy, he'll be happy. Now, are you ready?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What? Right now?

lines.speaker: Lelia
lines.text: Yup. Next contest starts soon and we don't have another slot for weeks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think so.

lines.speaker: Lelia
lines.text: Right, get to it then.

lines.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
lines.text: Welcome, one and all, to the Fortis Colosseum! We have a thrilling event lined up for you today, but first, we have something new to show you!

lines.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
lines.text: Introducing the kebab! This delicacy comes straight from the east and is just the thing to give you the strength you need after a hard day of work.

lines.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
lines.text: Indeed, observe the strength provided by a single bite of one!

lines.speaker: Minotaur
lines.text: Huh? Human... eat... friend?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What? No, it's a kebab. The meat is... buffalo... I think.

lines.speaker: Minotaur
lines.text: Kebab... is... minotaur?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No. It's buffalo.

lines.speaker: Minotaur
lines.text: Human... eat... minotaur! Human... die!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh boy...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need to prepare first.

lines.speaker: Lelia
lines.text: Well make it quick.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Nilsal, friend. Given that I've already served our first customers, I take it your trip to the Colosseum was a success?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I did run into a slight complication, but apart from that, it went very well.

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: You have done a great service to Varlamore, friend. Thanks to you, all here will be able to indulge in the joy that is kebabs. As thanks, I will offer you a special price for any kebabs you buy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do I not get to share in any of the profits, given I helped set it all up?

lines.speaker: Emelio
lines.text: Sorry, friend, but I must prepare some more kebabs for our next customers! Until next time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right...
